trialNoPerBlock.Description: trial number out of 87 trials within a block (0-86)

stim1_path.Description: file path for the stimulus presented on the left

stim1_healthRating.Description: participant's health rating for the left stimulus (0-100)

stim1_tasteRating.Description: participant's taste rating for the left stimulus (0-100)

stim1_willingToEatRating.Description: participant's willingness to eat rating for the left stimulus (0-100)

stim2_path.Description: file path for the stimulus presented on the right

stim2_healthRating.Description: participant's health rating for the right stimulus (0-100)

stim2_tasteRating.Description: participant's taste rating for the right stimulus (0-100)

stim2_willingToEatRating.Description: participant's willingness to eat rating for the right stimulus (0-100)

stimChosen_path.Description: file path for the stimulus chosen by participant

respKey.Description: participant's keypress response for the trial

respRT.Description: response time for keypress responses in seconds
